danger_signals.meaning: Time pressure / punishment for staying outside castle too long
Immediate threat to health; demons respawn after defeat

danger_signals.visual_form: Energy bar reduction (no invincibility blink frames)
danger_signals.meaning: Player is taking damage; rapid health loss without dodge frames indicates high danger

danger_signals.visual_form: Castle Garland occupied; demonic forces present throughout
danger_signals.meaning: World state: castle under hostile control; evil wizard and demonic army occupying territory

danger_signals.visual_form: Named boss entities (Homa, Doma, Blue Doma, Red Homa, Red Balkarma, Kama)
danger_signals.meaning: Major threats blocking progression to next castle story; must be defeated to advance

safety_signals.meaning: Health restoration point; fully restores life bar and extends max health by one unit
Safe commercial zones offering items for augmentation
Power upgrade acquisition; signals safe progression milestone
Inside castle is primary play space; outside triggers lightning hazard

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Demon Beast variants (Homa, Doma, Balkarma, Kama)
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Multiple demon types with color variants (Blue Doma, Red Homa, Red Balkarma)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Occupy Castle Garland; seize musical instruments; terrorizing Hudson land

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Musical instruments (seized by enemy); Queen Eliza in Castle Garland
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Castle Garland as seat of power; music-based communication culture; people/denizens of Hudson
Travels throughout Hudson land; tasked with rescue mission

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Demonic forces occupying castle interior; enemies in every room; musical instruments seized
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies spawn and respawn in rooms; bosses block progression; hostile occupation of multi-story structure

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Ascending from ground floor upward through four stories; unlocked after defeating bosses; rooms flow non-linearly
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Each story only accessible after defeating preceding boss; crystal ball acquisition gates access to next level

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Lightning bolts falling from sky when player remains outside castle
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Forces player to stay within castle; prevents extended exploration of exterior areas

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Instruments held by demonic forces; music boxes available as side-quest collectibles
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Minigame with elves/music boxes emerges as cumulative side-quest; each music box adds new elf with instrument

environmental_storytelling.example: Soft blocks vs hard blocks visually indistinguishable; player must shoot bubbles to discover hidden routes, shops, and items
Multi-story castle structure (four stories plus well, side towers, top) communicates scope of invasion and player journey upward
Scattered shops offer augmentations; some in plain sight, some hidden, communicating need for exploration and commerce within occupied territory
Defeated bosses release crystals that upgrade Milon's bubbles (larger, further-reaching); visually signals power growth and progression milestones
Each room contains honeycomb for full healing; communicates safe havens within dangerous rooms
Music box collection triggers 'Maze Song' minigame with progressive elf ensemble; tells story of musical restoration

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Spawn in rooms; attack player; can be destroyed by bubbles
Respawn after several seconds unless room boss is permanently defeated
Block progression to next story; must be defeated to advance
Release crystal ball; unlock access to next castle story; stay dead permanently
Rapid health loss without invincibility frames; must find honeycomb or avoid enemies
Lightning strikes; forces rapid retreat to interior
Bubbles increase in size and range; upgraded offensive capability

notes: Milon's Secret Castle communicates world-state primarily through environmental occupation (demonic forces in castle), progression gating (boss defeats unlock stories), and time pressure mechanics (lightning outside). Factions are indicated narratively (Maharito's army vs. Hudson land) rather than through color-coding or visual sigils—enemies are represented as generic 'demon' sprite variants. The game uses hidden block mechanics and non-linear room design to communicate exploration as key to resistance/rescue. Music serves thematic purpose (instruments seized, music boxes as side-quest) but not as direct visual danger signal. No invincibility frames on damage creates persistent visual danger state. Health honeycomb stations provide visual safe zones within otherwise hostile rooms.
